meta.title: Abada — Legal preparation for raising capital
meta.description: Investment-readiness documents and due diligence for Colombia's venture capital ecosystem.

footer.tagline: Legal infrastructure for Colombian startups raising venture capital.
footer.firmNote: Operated by {firm} — a VC-native law firm in Colombia.
footer.disclaimer: AI assistance guides the process; every legally significant document is reviewed by a named {firm} attorney.

public.headline: The legal layer for Colombian startups raising venture capital
public.subheadline: Prepare the five documents investors expect, with review by a named Balam Legal attorney.

securityCard.title: Every document reviewed by a firm attorney
securityCard.body: AI speeds up the draft; a named Balam Legal attorney reviews before you sign or share.

finalCta.title: Start with the NDA and founder vesting agreement
finalCta.subtitle: The first two checklist documents — guided flow, preview, and fingerprinted download.

pipeline.title: The five checklist documents
pipeline.subtitle: A guided flow per document — from investment-readiness to firm review.

public.disclosureBanner: AI assistance guides the process; every legally significant document is reviewed by a named {firm} attorney before you sign or share.
public.modulesSubtitle: Legal preparation, due diligence, and human review — built for Colombia's VC ecosystem.

heroCard.title: Round-ready
heroCard.description: Everything an investor expects to see, in one place.

readiness.title: Investment-readiness
readiness.body: NDA, vesting, IP assignment, employment agreement, and shareholders agreement — with AI help and human review.

diligence.title: Due diligence
diligence.body: Assessment organized by Colombian risk category, not a file tree.

review.title: Named review
review.body: Request paid review with a named lawyer, markup, and executive summary.

shell.quote: AI speeds up the draft; a named attorney reviews before you sign or share.

signIn.subtitle: Access your workspace on the platform.

onboarding.inviteHint: Invited to a firm? Open the link from your invitation email.

invite.title: You've been invited to a firm

firm.title: I'm a law firm
firm.description: Create your firm, invite your team, and manage legal reviews.

founder.title: I'm a founder
founder.description: Prepare investment-readiness documents to raise capital.

investor.title: I'm an investor
investor.description: Access due diligence rooms and shared documents.

createFirm.title: Create your firm
createFirm.description: You'll be the admin and can invite attorneys and partners.

dashboard.title: My workspace
dashboard.subtitle: Your investment-readiness checklist — five documents to be investor-ready.
dashboard.reviewDescription: Flag any document for help and a firm attorney will review your draft before you share it with investors.
dashboard.disclaimer: AI-generated drafts are not legal advice. Obtain named-attorney review before signing.
dashboard.focusDescription: Your highest-priority document based on checklist progress.
dashboard.allCompleteDescription: All investment-readiness documents are done. Review or download from the library.

documentsPage.title: Documents
documentsPage.subtitle: Five guided flows to get your startup investor-ready — start anywhere or continue where you left off.
documentsPage.catalogSubtitle: Browse every document in your investment-readiness pack, in checklist order.
documentsPage.catalogDescription: Each document builds on the last. Open any flow to draft, save, and download.
documentsPage.comingSoon: The guided flow for this document is not available yet.

sala.title: My due diligence rooms
sala.subtitle: Upload documents requested by the firm as part of your DD process.
sala.empty: You have no active rooms yet. When the firm invites you to a process, it will appear here.
sala.tipsDescription: Cover corporate, financial, tax, and labor categories first — investors and the firm review against Colombian DD standards.
sala.coverageDescription: Track which categories still need a file before the firm can complete its review.
sala.dealSubtitle: Upload and manage documents for this data room.
sala.uploadDescription: Each file is versioned and receives an audit fingerprint.
sala.ndaGateLabel: Requires signed NDA before sharing with investors

errors.file_too_large: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to upload to this room.

nda.title: Mutual non-disclosure agreement
nda.description: Protect sensitive information in investor conversations.

vesting.title: Founder vesting agreement
vesting.description: Align incentives with the horizon funds expect.

ip.title: Intellectual property assignment
ip.description: Ensure the company owns its IP.

employment.title: Investment-ready employment agreement
employment.description: Employment contract with clauses investors review.

flow.finalizeDescription: Choose the language for the PDF or preview (disclaimers and signature labels). You can download without submitting for review.
flow.documentLanguageHint: The document body, signature labels, and legal disclaimers are generated in the selected language.
flow.previewIncomplete: Preview has pending fields — complete the form for a final draft.
flow.finalizeDescriptionReviewed: Your attorney-reviewed PDF includes the firm watermark and signature. Choose the language before downloading.
flow.finalizeDescriptionPending: Your draft is with the firm for review. You can still preview or download a draft PDF while you wait.
flow.reviewDescription: When your draft is ready, send it to the firm's review queue. You can add an optional note for the attorney.
flow.reviewPlaceholder: Optional note for the reviewing attorney…
flow.reviewCompleteDescription: This document has been reviewed and signed by a named attorney. Download the reviewed PDF above.
flow.reviewPendingDescription: Your draft is in the firm's review queue. You'll be notified when the review is complete.
flow.reviewSent: Draft sent to the firm's review queue.
flow.reviewIncomplete: Complete all required fields before submitting for review.
flow.reviewAlreadySubmitted: This document is already in review or has been completed.
flow.helpDescription: Flag this document so a firm attorney can follow up.
flow.helpPlaceholder: Describe your question or the field you're unsure about…
flow.helpRequired: Write a message before flagging for help.
flow.helpSent: Document flagged. The firm will review your request.
flow.disclaimer: This draft was generated with AI assistance. Obtain named-attorney review before signing.

nda.1: Identify the startup and counterparty (fund or investor).
nda.2: Define purpose, term, and agreement type.

vesting.2: Shares subject to vesting, cliff, and start date.

ip.2: Description, scope, consideration, and effective date.

employment.2: Role, start date, salary, and contract type.

shareholders.3: Qualified majority, dispute resolution, and signatory.

nda.purpose: Evaluation of a potential seed round investment…

vesting.additional_terms: Any additional clause agreed with the firm…

ip.consideration: e.g. Equity, cash, or nominal sum

nda.company_id: You may omit punctuation; the firm will normalize on review.
nda.purpose: Be specific: round, due diligence, term sheet negotiation, etc.

vesting.vesting_months: Standard VC vesting in Colombia is often 48 months.

ip.ip_description: List code, brands, designs, or know-how being assigned.

employment.salary_monthly_cop: Gross monthly salary in Colombian pesos.

shareholders.drag_along_threshold_pct: Common VC range: 66–80%. The firm will validate for your round.
shareholders.qualified_majority_pct: Often 66.67% for reserved matters in Colombian SAS.

ip.scope_all: All current and future IP related to the business
ip.scope_specified: Only the IP described in this agreement

ai.title: Drafting assistant
ai.description: Ask about clauses, standard Colombian VC terms, or how to complete a field.
ai.welcome: Hi — I can help with clauses, standard Colombian VC terms, and how to complete fields in this document. Pick a suggestion or type your question below.
ai.welcomeShort: Ask about clauses or document fields
ai.error: Could not get a response. Check your connection or AI configuration.
ai.errorNotConfigured: AI is not configured. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to your environment.
ai.disclaimer: AI assistance is not legal advice. A named attorney must review before signing.
ai.promptPrefix: I am preparing the «{document}» document for investment-readiness in Colombia.

nda.mutual: Mutual or unilateral with this fund?
nda.purpose: How should I phrase the disclosure purpose?

vesting.departure: What counts as a good leaver in VC?

ip.scope: Assign all IP or only what's described?

shareholders.tagAlong: Do we need tag-along for this round?
shareholders.antiDilution: Broad-based anti-dilution — when to use it?

documents.empty: No documents in this room yet.

dashboard.subtitle: Evaluate opportunities with the firm's assessment, organized by risk.
dashboard.emptyDescription: When a fund invites you to a process, you'll see the assessment here.
dashboard.emptyBody: The view prioritizes findings by Colombian risk category, not the document tree.

rooms.title: Data rooms
rooms.subtitle: Access due diligence rooms shared with you.

room.title: Shared due diligence rooms
room.subtitle: Review the firm's published assessment, risk findings, and shared documents.
room.empty: No rooms have been shared with you yet. When a fund adds you to a process, it will appear here.
room.dealSubtitle: Assessment-first view organized by Colombian risk category.
room.assessmentPendingDescription: The firm is still preparing the executive assessment for this process. Check back soon.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage founder reviews, due diligence rooms, and your firm's team.
dashboard.membershipHint: Firm access is invite-only. Administrators can invite colleagues from Team.
dashboard.modulesSubtitle: Jump into your firm's core tools.

queue.description: Founder requests for named-attorney review on investment-readiness documents.

dd.description: Create rooms, review target documents, and log findings by risk category.

team.description: Invite colleagues with magic links and manage access roles.

recentActivity.title: Needs attention
recentActivity.description: Open reviews waiting for the firm's response.
recentActivity.empty: No pending reviews. You're all caught up.

invitePanel.title: Invite your team
invitePanel.description: Access is invite-only. Administrators can send magic links from Team.

queue.title: Review queue
queue.subtitle: Investment-readiness document review requests.
queue.empty: No review requests in the queue. When a founder flags a document for help, it will appear here.

review.subtitle: Status: {status}
review.markupDescription: Internal notes and status for this review.
review.completeNote: When marked completed, your name is appended in cursive on the founder's PDF and the firm watermark is applied.

dd.title: DD rooms
dd.subtitle: Create rooms, review target documents, and record findings by risk category.
dd.empty: No active rooms. Create a room to start a due diligence process.
dd.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This removes all documents, findings, and assessments. The founder will lose access.
dd.founderHint: Choose a founder you have worked with, or enter their account email if they already use Abada.
dd.dealSubtitle: Review documents, findings, and assessment for this room.

errors.founder_not_found: No founder account found with that email. They need to sign up on Abada first.
errors.founder_required: Select or enter a founder for this room.
errors.founder_ambiguous: Multiple founder accounts match that email. Contact support to resolve the duplicate.
errors.tenant_not_configured: Firm workspace is not configured correctly. Ask an admin to check tenant setup.

team.title: Firm team
team.subtitle: Invite colleagues with a magic link and manage access.
team.inviteDescription: Generate an invite link. The invitee will create an account and join your firm.
team.linkReady: Link ready — share it with the invitee:

errors.last_admin: At least one administrator must remain on the firm.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

invite.title: Join your firm
invite.description: You were invited as {email}. Create your account to access the back-office.
invite.createAccountHint: Use the same email address that received the invitation.
invite.invalidDescription: This link expired or was already used. Ask an administrator for a new invite.
invite.membershipRequiredDescription: Firm access is invite-only. Ask an administrator to send you a link.
invite.emailMismatchDescription: Sign in with {email} or ask for a new invitation to that address.
